meta.title: Felix Zhang | Full-Stack Engineer
meta.description: Felix Zhang is a Full-Stack Engineer with 6+ years of experience delivering scalable web applications, cloud infrastructure, and digital experiences. Based in Toronto, Canada.
meta.ogDescription: Full-Stack Engineer with 6+ years of experience delivering scalable web applications, cloud infrastructure, and digital experiences.

hero.subtitle: Full-Stack Engineer
subtitleParts: I code stuff, mostly backend, sometimes frontend and infra. ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
hero.revealCta: press Enter or click to reveal ⏎

summary: Scalable web apps, cloud infra & digital experiences

historyLog.description: Monks.flow AI pipeline operational. LLM content generators spawned across NestJS workers. Claude Code agent integrated for autonomous refactoring cycles.
Zoox.com V2.0 pushed to production. Full architectural overhaul — frontend, backend, CMS, cloud infra. Lighthouse perf and a11y scores holding at 90+.
Adidas LA Flagship retail experience activated. NFC modules synced with AWS backend. Full-stack in-store digital pipeline operational.
Meta internal deployment pipeline engaged. Novi.com shipped under elevated security protocols. Multi-locale CMS and Newsroom feature operational. Compliance audit: passed.
MediaMonks system integration initialized. Primary employment loop commenced. Enterprise stack onboarding complete.
Production database fault at Palomino Systems. Stripe webhook cascade triggered data inconsistency. Manual reconciliation applied. Post-mortem filed.

expertise.heading: What I Do

areas.title: Cloud & DevOps

areas.title: Backend Development

areas.title: Database & Storage

areas.title: Full-Stack Architecture

areas.title: Tools & Workflow

items.title: Full-Stack Engineer
highlights: SWE IC on Monks.flow. MediaMonks' full-stack AI platform for marketing — LLM-driven content generation pipelines built with NestJS, Redis, Docker, PostgreSQL and Vite, along with high test coverage maintained across all services

Integrated Claude Code into the development lifecycle of Monks.flow to automate complex refactors, generate comprehensive test suites, and accelerate feature iteration across the NestJS and Redis layers

Tech-led the full site launch of Zoox.com end-to-end — owning frontend architecture, backend APIs, headless CMS integration, and cloud infrastructure — delivering a highly animated experience with consistently high Lighthouse performance and accessibility scores (90+)

Tech lead on the Oculus Creators platform and Novi.com. Deployed production code to Meta's internal infrastructure as a contingent engineer, adhering to enterprise-level code quality, security compliance, and access-control standards
Tech lead on Adidas LA Flagship retail digital experience. Full-stack digital in store experience using NextJS, AWS, Node and NFC modules
Tech lead on Adidas FIFA World Cup and Airbnb Voyager Scholarship microsites
Architected and shipped full-stack solutions for KFC, Burger King and Texas State Technical College
IC Engineer for Facebook Marketplace, WhatsApp.com, Oculus.com, and Visa Super Bowl digital experiences
Championed monorepo architecture standards and frontend framework best practices across the engineering department
Led co-op recruitment strategy and mentorship programs, growing multiple junior engineers into full-time employees

items.title: Full-Stack Application Developer
highlights: Designed and implemented a subscription management system with Stripe API (automated renewal and webhook-driven state)
Orchestrated enterprise data migration for Sterling Capital Brokers across MySQL and PostgreSQL using Laravel-based ETL pipelines
Delivered full-stack web applications with Laravel, MySQL, and JavaScript, collaborating directly with stakeholders on requirements and QA

projects.heading: Things I've Built
projects.description: A mix of cloud infrastructure, backend services, and full-stack applications I've worked on.

items.title: Zoox.com
items.description: Full-stack digital experience for Zoox, Amazon's autonomous vehicle subsidiary. Architected and delivered a high-performance web platform showcasing their robotaxi technology.

items.title: Adidas Experiences
items.description: Multiple high-profile Adidas projects including the LA flagship retail installation, FIFA World Cup campaign, and Adidas Community platform.

items.title: Novi.com (Meta)
items.description: Led development of the Novi digital wallet marketing site at Meta. Multi-locale launch with advanced content management and the Novi Newsroom feature.
